overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian robes walking through a sunlit temple complex toward the Nile River. The character passes through a monumental stone gateway, navigates past NPCs in period clothing, and approaches a waterfront pergola with views of the river and distant temples.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the monumental stone gateway toward the inner temple courtyard

notable_agents.action: priest in green robes holding a ceremonial staff, walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive black stone entrance towers with decorative gold banding and hanging white banners
large black ceramic planter with gold geometric patterns containing palm trees
large black ceramic planter with gold geometric patterns containing palm trees
wide blue river visible beyond the temple walls with distant buildings on the far bank
light-colored sandstone tiles scattered with red and yellow flower petals

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grand stone gateway into a sunlit temple plaza. Large decorated planters flank the entrance while NPCs in ancient Egyptian dress move through the space. The Nile River is visible in the distance to the left, and the stone pavement is scattered with ceremonial flower petals.

events.description: large golden winged monument comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing through the courtyard passing by a large golden ceremonial monument

notable_agents.action: woman in white linen dress carrying a basket on her head, walking alongside the path

entered.detail: large golden statue with outstretched wings and sun disk on a tall stone pedestal
tall rectangular stone tower with hieroglyphic carvings

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the temple complex, passing a striking golden winged monument on the right. A stone obelisk rises in the center distance, and the Nile River becomes more prominent on the left. NPCs continue to populate the courtyard, including a woman carrying goods on her head.

events.description: character walks under the wooden pergola with white fabric curtains
character reaches the Nile river waterfront with sailing barges visible

agents.ego_description: walking under the waterfront canopy toward the Nile river edge

entered.detail: wooden post structure with white fabric drapes and potted red flowers
flowing white linen curtains hanging from the pergola beams
flowing white linen curtains hanging from the pergola beams
wooden sailing vessel with triangular sail on the Nile river
cityscape with temples and palm trees visible across the river

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shaded pergola walkway with flowing white curtains that leads to the Nile waterfront. The river becomes the dominant feature on the left, with an ancient sailing barge visible on the water. Across the river, a distant temple complex rises against the horizon as the character approaches the stone railing at the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the grand entrance of a temple complex toward the open expanse of the Nile waterfront. It begins as the character passes through a monumental stone gateway flanked by decorated planters, moving across a sunlit plaza where ceremonial flower petals scatter the pavement. As the character ventures deeper into the complex, the view expands to reveal a golden winged monument and a towering central obelisk while the river becomes increasingly prominent to the left. The scene then shifts from the open courtyard into the cool shade of a pergola walkway draped with flowing white curtains. Finally, the path opens up to the water's edge, where a sailing barge drifts on the river and a distant temple complex rises against the horizon.
